name: revit_print_views
description: Prints views or sheet sets using PrintManager settings equivalent to the native Revit print dialog.

printer_name.description: Installed printer or virtual PDF/DWF/XPS driver name

view_sheet_set_name.description: Named ViewSheetSet to print when range is Select or Range

print_to_file.description: Whether to print to file instead of a physical printer

file_path.description: Output path when print_to_file is true

notes: Replace PrintMgrForm with direct PrintManager configuration; verify at least one installed printer exists.
